// <auto-generated/>
#pragma warning disable
#nullable enable

public sealed class IRepositoryMock : global::TUnit.Mocks.Mock<global::IRepository>, global::IRepository
{
    [global::System.ComponentModel.EditorBrowsable(global::System.ComponentModel.EditorBrowsableState.Never)]
    internal IRepositoryMock(global::IRepository mockObject, global::TUnit.Mocks.MockEngine<global::IRepository> engine)
        : base(mockObject, engine) { }

    T global::IRepository.GetById<T>(int id) where T : class => Object.GetById<T>(id);

    void global::IRepository.Save<T>(T entity) where T : class
    {
        Object.Save<T>(entity);
    }

    TResult global::IRepository.Transform<TInput, TResult>(TInput input) where TResult : struct => Object.Transform<TInput, TResult>(input);
}


// ===== FILE SEPARATOR =====

// <auto-generated/>
#pragma warning disable
#nullable enable

file sealed class IRepositoryMockImpl : global::IRepository, global::TUnit.Mocks.IRaisable, global::TUnit.Mocks.IMockObject
{
    private readonly global::TUnit.Mocks.MockEngine<global::IRepository> _engine;

    [global::System.ComponentModel.EditorBrowsable(global::System.ComponentModel.EditorBrowsableState.Never)]
    global::TUnit.Mocks.IMock? global::TUnit.Mocks.IMockObject.MockWrapper { get; set; }

    internal IRepositoryMockImpl(global::TUnit.Mocks.MockEngine<global::IRepository> engine)
    {
        _engine = engine;
    }

    public T GetById<T>(int id) where T : class
    {
        return _engine.HandleCallWithReturn<T>(0, "GetById", new object?[] { id }, default!, global::TUnit.Mocks.TypeArguments.Of<T>.Value);
    }

    public void Save<T>(T entity) where T : class, new()
    {
        _engine.HandleCall(1, "Save", new object?[] { entity }, global::TUnit.Mocks.TypeArguments.Of<T>.Value);
    }

    public TResult Transform<TInput, TResult>(TInput input) where TInput : notnull where TResult : struct
    {
        return _engine.HandleCallWithReturn<TResult>(2, "Transform", new object?[] { input }, default, global::TUnit.Mocks.TypeArguments.Of<TInput, TResult>.Value);
    }

    [global::System.ComponentModel.EditorBrowsable(global::System.ComponentModel.EditorBrowsableState.Never)]
    public void RaiseEvent(string eventName, object? args)
    {
        throw new global::System.InvalidOperationException($"No event named '{eventName}' exists on this mock.");
    }
}

internal static class IRepositoryMockFactory
{
    [global::System.Runtime.CompilerServices.ModuleInitializer]
    internal static void Register()
    {
        global::TUnit.Mocks.MockRegistry.RegisterFactory<global::IRepository>(Create);
    }

    internal static global::TUnit.Mocks.Mock<global::IRepository> CreateAutoMock(global::TUnit.Mocks.MockBehavior behavior)
    {
        var engine = new global::TUnit.Mocks.MockEngine<global::IRepository>(behavior);
        var impl = new IRepositoryMockImpl(engine);
        engine.Raisable = impl;
        var mock = new IRepositoryMock(impl, engine);
        return mock;
    }

    internal static global::TUnit.Mocks.Mock<global::IRepository> Create(global::TUnit.Mocks.MockBehavior behavior, object[] constructorArgs)
    {
        if (constructorArgs.Length > 0) throw new global::System.ArgumentException($"Interface mock 'global::IRepository' does not support constructor arguments, but {constructorArgs.Length} were provided.");
        var engine = new global::TUnit.Mocks.MockEngine<global::IRepository>(behavior);
        var impl = new IRepositoryMockImpl(engine);
        engine.Raisable = impl;
        var mock = new IRepositoryMock(impl, engine);
        return mock;
    }
}

[global::System.ComponentModel.EditorBrowsable(global::System.ComponentModel.EditorBrowsableState.Never)]
public sealed class IRepository_GetById_M0_MockCall<T> : global::TUnit.Mocks.Verification.ICallVerification where T : class
{
    private readonly global::TUnit.Mocks.IMockEngineAccess _engine;
    private readonly int _memberId;
    private readonly string _memberName;
    private readonly global::TUnit.Mocks.Arguments.IArgumentMatcher[] _matchers;
    private readonly global::System.Collections.Immutable.ImmutableArray<global::System.Type> _typeArguments;
    private global::TUnit.Mocks.Setup.MethodSetupBuilder<T>? _builder;

    internal IRepository_GetById_M0_MockCall(global::TUnit.Mocks.IMockEngineAccess engine, int memberId, string memberName, global::TUnit.Mocks.Arguments.IArgumentMatcher[] matchers, global::System.Collections.Immutable.ImmutableArray<global::System.Type> typeArguments)
    {
        _engine = engine;
        _memberId = memberId;
        _memberName = memberName;
        _matchers = matchers;
        _typeArguments = typeArguments;
    }

    private global::TUnit.Mocks.Setup.MethodSetupBuilder<T> EnsureSetup()
    {
        var existing = global::System.Threading.Volatile.Read(ref _builder);
        if (existing is not null) return existing;
        return EnsureSetupSlow();
    }

    [global::System.Runtime.CompilerServices.MethodImpl(global::System.Runtime.CompilerServices.MethodImplOptions.NoInlining)]
    private global::TUnit.Mocks.Setup.MethodSetupBuilder<T> EnsureSetupSlow()
    {
        var setup = new global::TUnit.Mocks.Setup.MethodSetup(_memberId, _matchers, _memberName, _typeArguments);
        var fresh = new global::TUnit.Mocks.Setup.MethodSetupBuilder<T>(setup);
        var prev = global::System.Threading.Interlocked.CompareExchange(ref _builder, fresh, null);
        if (prev is not null) return prev;
        // AddSetup runs only on the CAS winner. Setup is sequential in practice,
        // so a concurrent loser observing the builder before registration is benign.
        _engine.AddSetup(setup);
        return fresh;
    }

    /// <inheritdoc />
    public IRepository_GetById_M0_MockCall<T> Returns(T value) { EnsureSetup().Returns(value); return this; }
    /// <inheritdoc />
    public IRepository_GetById_M0_MockCall<T> Returns(global::System.Func<T> factory) { EnsureSetup().Returns(factory); return this; }
    /// <inheritdoc />
    public IRepository_GetById_M0_MockCall<T> ReturnsSequentially(params T[] values) { EnsureSetup().ReturnsSequentially(values); return this; }
    /// <inheritdoc />
    public IRepository_GetById_M0_MockCall<T> Throws<TException>() where TException : global::System.Exception, new() { EnsureSetup().Throws<TException>(); return this; }
    /// <inheritdoc />
    public IRepository_GetById_M0_MockCall<T> Throws(global::System.Exception exception) { EnsureSetup().Throws(exception); return this; }
    /// <inheritdoc />
    public IRepository_GetById_M0_MockCall<T> Callback(global::System.Action callback) { EnsureSetup().Callback(callback); return this; }
    /// <inheritdoc />
    public IRepository_GetById_M0_MockCall<T> TransitionsTo(string stateName) { EnsureSetup().TransitionsTo(stateName); return this; }
    /// <inheritdoc />
    public IRepository_GetById_M0_MockCall<T> Then() { EnsureSetup().Then(); return this; }

    /// <summary>Configure a typed computed return value using the actual method parameters.</summary>
    public IRepository_GetById_M0_MockCall<T> Returns(global::System.Func<int, T> factory)
    {
        EnsureSetup().Returns(args => factory((int)args[0]!));
        return this;
    }

    /// <summary>Execute a typed callback using the actual method parameters.</summary>
    public IRepository_GetById_M0_MockCall<T> Callback(global::System.Action<int> callback)
    {
        EnsureSetup().Callback(callback);
        return this;
    }

    /// <summary>Configure a typed computed exception using the actual method parameters.</summary>
    public IRepository_GetById_M0_MockCall<T> Throws(global::System.Func<int, global::System.Exception> exceptionFactory)
    {
        EnsureSetup().Throws(args => exceptionFactory((int)args[0]!));
        return this;
    }

    // ICallVerification
    /// <inheritdoc />
    public void WasCalled() => new global::TUnit.Mocks.MockMethodCall<object?>(_engine, _memberId, _memberName, _matchers, _typeArguments).WasCalled();
    /// <inheritdoc />
    public void WasCalled(global::TUnit.Mocks.Times times) => new global::TUnit.Mocks.MockMethodCall<object?>(_engine, _memberId, _memberName, _matchers, _typeArguments).WasCalled(times);
    /// <inheritdoc />
    public void WasCalled(global::TUnit.Mocks.Times times, string? message) => new global::TUnit.Mocks.MockMethodCall<object?>(_engine, _memberId, _memberName, _matchers, _typeArguments).WasCalled(times, message);
    /// <inheritdoc />
    public void WasCalled(string? message) => new global::TUnit.Mocks.MockMethodCall<object?>(_engine, _memberId, _memberName, _matchers, _typeArguments).WasCalled(message);
    /// <inheritdoc />
    public void WasNeverCalled() => new global::TUnit.Mocks.MockMethodCall<object?>(_engine, _memberId, _memberName, _matchers, _typeArguments).WasNeverCalled();
    /// <inheritdoc />
    public void WasNeverCalled(string? message) => new global::TUnit.Mocks.MockMethodCall<object?>(_engine, _memberId, _memberName, _matchers, _typeArguments).WasNeverCalled(message);
}

[global::System.ComponentModel.EditorBrowsable(global::System.ComponentModel.EditorBrowsableState.Never)]
public sealed class IRepository_Save_M1_MockCall<T> : global::TUnit.Mocks.Verification.ICallVerification where T : class, new()
{
    private readonly global::TUnit.Mocks.IMockEngineAccess _engine;
    private readonly int _memberId;
    private readonly string _memberName;
    private readonly global::TUnit.Mocks.Arguments.IArgumentMatcher[] _matchers;
    private readonly global::System.Collections.Immutable.ImmutableArray<global::System.Type> _typeArguments;
    private global::TUnit.Mocks.Setup.VoidMethodSetupBuilder? _builder;

    internal IRepository_Save_M1_MockCall(global::TUnit.Mocks.IMockEngineAccess engine, int memberId, string memberName, global::TUnit.Mocks.Arguments.IArgumentMatcher[] matchers, global::System.Collections.Immutable.ImmutableArray<global::System.Type> typeArguments)
    {
        _engine = engine;
        _memberId = memberId;
        _memberName = memberName;
        _matchers = matchers;
        _typeArguments = typeArguments;
        _ = EnsureSetup();
    }

    private global::TUnit.Mocks.Setup.VoidMethodSetupBuilder EnsureSetup()
    {
        var existing = global::System.Threading.Volatile.Read(ref _builder);
        if (existing is not null) return existing;
        return EnsureSetupSlow();
    }

    [global::System.Runtime.CompilerServices.MethodImpl(global::System.Runtime.CompilerServices.MethodImplOptions.NoInlining)]
    private global::TUnit.Mocks.Setup.VoidMethodSetupBuilder EnsureSetupSlow()
    {
        var setup = new global::TUnit.Mocks.Setup.MethodSetup(_memberId, _matchers, _memberName, _typeArguments);
        var fresh = new global::TUnit.Mocks.Setup.VoidMethodSetupBuilder(setup);
        var prev = global::System.Threading.Interlocked.CompareExchange(ref _builder, fresh, null);
        if (prev is not null) return prev;
        // AddSetup runs only on the CAS winner. Setup is sequential in practice,
        // so a concurrent loser observing the builder before registration is benign.
        _engine.AddSetup(setup);
        return fresh;
    }

    /// <inheritdoc />
    public IRepository_Save_M1_MockCall<T> Returns() { EnsureSetup().Returns(); return this; }
    /// <inheritdoc />
    public IRepository_Save_M1_MockCall<T> Throws<TException>() where TException : global::System.Exception, new() { EnsureSetup().Throws<TException>(); return this; }
    /// <inheritdoc />
    public IRepository_Save_M1_MockCall<T> Throws(global::System.Exception exception) { EnsureSetup().Throws(exception); return this; }
    /// <inheritdoc />
    public IRepository_Save_M1_MockCall<T> Callback(global::System.Action callback) { EnsureSetup().Callback(callback); return this; }
    /// <inheritdoc />
    public IRepository_Save_M1_MockCall<T> TransitionsTo(string stateName) { EnsureSetup().TransitionsTo(stateName); return this; }
    /// <inheritdoc />
    public IRepository_Save_M1_MockCall<T> Then() { EnsureSetup().Then(); return this; }

    /// <summary>Execute a typed callback using the actual method parameters.</summary>
    public IRepository_Save_M1_MockCall<T> Callback(global::System.Action<T> callback)
    {
        EnsureSetup().Callback(callback);
        return this;
    }

    /// <summary>Configure a typed computed exception using the actual method parameters.</summary>
    public IRepository_Save_M1_MockCall<T> Throws(global::System.Func<T, global::System.Exception> exceptionFactory)
    {
        EnsureSetup().Throws(args => exceptionFactory((T)args[0]!));
        return this;
    }

    // ICallVerification
    /// <inheritdoc />
    public void WasCalled() => new global::TUnit.Mocks.MockMethodCall<object?>(_engine, _memberId, _memberName, _matchers, _typeArguments).WasCalled();
    /// <inheritdoc />
    public void WasCalled(global::TUnit.Mocks.Times times) => new global::TUnit.Mocks.MockMethodCall<object?>(_engine, _memberId, _memberName, _matchers, _typeArguments).WasCalled(times);
    /// <inheritdoc />

    /// <inheritdoc />

    /// <inheritdoc />

    public void WasNeverCalled(string? message) => new global::TUnit.Mocks.MockMethodCall<object?>(_engine, _memberId, _memberName, _matchers, _typeArguments).WasNeverCalled(message);
}

[global::System.ComponentModel.EditorBrowsable(global::System.ComponentModel.EditorBrowsableState.Never)]
public sealed class IRepository_Transform_M2_MockCall<TInput, TResult> : global::TUnit.Mocks.Verification.ICallVerification where TInput : notnull where TResult : struct
{
    private readonly global::TUnit.Mocks.IMockEngineAccess _engine;
    private readonly int _memberId;
    private readonly string _memberName;
    private readonly global::TUnit.Mocks.Arguments.IArgumentMatcher[] _matchers;
    private readonly global::System.Collections.Immutable.ImmutableArray<global::System.Type> _typeArguments;
    private global::TUnit.Mocks.Setup.MethodSetupBuilder<TResult>? _builder;

    internal IRepository_Transform_M2_MockCall(global::TUnit.Mocks.IMockEngineAccess engine, int memberId, string memberName, global::TUnit.Mocks.Arguments.IArgumentMatcher[] matchers, global::System.Collections.Immutable.ImmutableArray<global::System.Type> typeArguments)
    {
        _engine = engine;
        _memberId = memberId;
        _memberName = memberName;
        _matchers = matchers;
        _typeArguments = typeArguments;
    }

    private global::TUnit.Mocks.Setup.MethodSetupBuilder<TResult> EnsureSetup()
    {
        var existing = global::System.Threading.Volatile.Read(ref _builder);
        if (existing is not null) return existing;
        return EnsureSetupSlow();
    }

    [global::System.Runtime.CompilerServices.MethodImpl(global::System.Runtime.CompilerServices.MethodImplOptions.NoInlining)]
    private global::TUnit.Mocks.Setup.MethodSetupBuilder<TResult> EnsureSetupSlow()
    {
        var setup = new global::TUnit.Mocks.Setup.MethodSetup(_memberId, _matchers, _memberName, _typeArguments);
        var fresh = new global::TUnit.Mocks.Setup.MethodSetupBuilder<TResult>(setup);
        var prev = global::System.Threading.Interlocked.CompareExchange(ref _builder, fresh, null);
        if (prev is not null) return prev;
        // AddSetup runs only on the CAS winner. Setup is sequential in practice,
        // so a concurrent loser observing the builder before registration is benign.
        _engine.AddSetup(setup);
        return fresh;
    }

    /// <inheritdoc />
    public IRepository_Transform_M2_MockCall<TInput, TResult> Returns(TResult value) { EnsureSetup().Returns(value); return this; }
    /// <inheritdoc />
    public IRepository_Transform_M2_MockCall<TInput, TResult> Returns(global::System.Func<TResult> factory) { EnsureSetup().Returns(factory); return this; }
    /// <inheritdoc />
    public IRepository_Transform_M2_MockCall<TInput, TResult> ReturnsSequentially(params TResult[] values) { EnsureSetup().ReturnsSequentially(values); return this; }
    /// <inheritdoc />
    public IRepository_Transform_M2_MockCall<TInput, TResult> Throws<TException>() where TException : global::System.Exception, new() { EnsureSetup().Throws<TException>(); return this; }
    /// <inheritdoc />
    public IRepository_Transform_M2_MockCall<TInput, TResult> Throws(global::System.Exception exception) { EnsureSetup().Throws(exception); return this; }
    /// <inheritdoc />
    public IRepository_Transform_M2_MockCall<TInput, TResult> Callback(global::System.Action callback) { EnsureSetup().Callback(callback); return this; }
    /// <inheritdoc />
    public IRepository_Transform_M2_MockCall<TInput, TResult> TransitionsTo(string stateName) { EnsureSetup().TransitionsTo(stateName); return this; }
    /// <inheritdoc />
    public IRepository_Transform_M2_MockCall<TInput, TResult> Then() { EnsureSetup().Then(); return this; }

    /// <summary>Configure a typed computed return value using the actual method parameters.</summary>
    public IRepository_Transform_M2_MockCall<TInput, TResult> Returns(global::System.Func<TInput, TResult> factory)
    {
        EnsureSetup().Returns(args => factory((TInput)args[0]!));
        return this;
    }

    /// <summary>Execute a typed callback using the actual method parameters.</summary>
    public IRepository_Transform_M2_MockCall<TInput, TResult> Callback(global::System.Action<TInput> callback)
    {
        EnsureSetup().Callback(callback);
        return this;
    }

    /// <summary>Configure a typed computed exception using the actual method parameters.</summary>
    public IRepository_Transform_M2_MockCall<TInput, TResult> Throws(global::System.Func<TInput, global::System.Exception> exceptionFactory)
    {
        EnsureSetup().Throws(args => exceptionFactory((TInput)args[0]!));
        return this;
    }

    // ICallVerification
    /// <inheritdoc />
    public void WasCalled() => new global::TUnit.Mocks.MockMethodCall<object?>(_engine, _memberId, _memberName, _matchers, _typeArguments).WasCalled();
    /// <inheritdoc />
    public void WasCalled(global::TUnit.Mocks.Times times) => new global::TUnit.Mocks.MockMethodCall<object?>(_engine, _memberId, _memberName, _matchers, _typeArguments).WasCalled(times);
    /// <inheritdoc />

    /// <inheritdoc />
    public void WasCalled(string? message) => new global::TUnit.Mocks.MockMethodCall<object?>(_engine, _memberId, _memberName, _matchers, _typeArguments).WasCalled(message);
    /// <inheritdoc />

    /// <inheritdoc />
    public void WasNeverCalled(string? message) => new global::TUnit.Mocks.MockMethodCall<object?>(_engine, _memberId, _memberName, _matchers, _typeArguments).WasNeverCalled(message);
}


// ===== FILE SEPARATOR =====

// <auto-generated/>
#pragma warning disable
#nullable enable

namespace TUnit.Mocks
{
    public static class IRepository_MockStaticExtension
    {
        extension(global::IRepository _)
        {
            public static global::IRepositoryMock Mock(global::TUnit.Mocks.MockBehavior behavior = global::TUnit.Mocks.MockBehavior.Loose)
            {
                return (global::IRepositoryMock)global::IRepositoryMockFactory.CreateAutoMock(behavior);
            }
        }
    }
}


// ===== FILE SEPARATOR =====

// <auto-generated/>
#pragma warning disable
#nullable enable

namespace TUnit.Mocks.Generated;
